critical_issues.title: RBAC changes are not currently part of tracked branch content
critical_issues.recommendation: Add and commit RBAC files before merge
critical_issues.resolution: Committed infra/modules/rbac.bicep and generated infra/modules/rbac.json via report_progress commit a0f5f8f

critical_issues.title: No deployment entrypoint invocation of RBAC module found
critical_issues.recommendation: Wire infra/modules/rbac.bicep into top-level deployment template
critical_issues.resolution: Added infra/main.bicep with module invocation passing principalId, blobContainerResourceId, and keyVaultResourceId

suggestions.title: Scope derivation is fragile for cross-RG/subscription IDs
suggestions.recommendation: Use explicit subscription/resource-group scoping or structured params for existing resources
suggestions.notes: Current repository issue scope only requires the role assignments and container-level scope; cross-subscription deployment patterns are out of scope for INF-05. Current template compiles and satisfies stated acceptance criteria inputs.
